title: HOME BASE RECOVERY - 211info
text: VOA OREGON OUTPATIENT SERVICES HOME BASE RECOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clean and sober housing and addiction treatment. Participants in the program agree to attend treatment while being provided with monitored housing, recovery mentors, and addiction and mental health counseling. 10564 SE Washington Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Must be in recovery from alcohol or drug addiction Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 227-6092 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 227-6092 Program Director Christina Anderson Intake (971) 334-2004 Lead Daniel Spotanski Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for availability information FEES: Call for information DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6:15pm, Saturday 9:30am-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the MAX Blue and Green lines and near bus lines #15, #20, and #22 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Ex-Offender Reentry Programs Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VOA OREGON OUTPATIENT SERVICES
